message:
fix(project): prevent TOCTOU race in SetAssociation and RemoveAssociation

The previous implementation released the lock between Load() and Save(),
creating a race condition where concurrent modifications could be lost.

Changes:
- Add internal loadLocked() and saveLocked() methods
- Hold write lock for entire read-modify-write cycle in SetAssociation
- Hold write lock for entire read-modify-write cycle in RemoveAssociation
